cases.input: Bootstrap a brand-new Jarvis OS at /Users/jm/jarvis-os; the directory is completely empty.
The OS at /Users/jm/jarvis-os has a hand-edited CLAUDE.md but no MEMORY.md and no N2-N4; complete only what is missing in safe mode.
Re-seed the root CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md at /Users/jm/jarvis-os with --force, showing diffs before overwriting.
Complete the OS at /Users/jm/jarvis-os without touching CLAUDE.local.md or the user-context folder.
Initialize /Users/jm/jarvis-os; operator is Javier, active brand JM Labs, goal personal innovation lab.
Seed MEMORY.md at /Users/jm/jarvis-os with MetodologIA as active brands.
Run jarvis-bootstrap a second time on the already-complete OS at /Users/jm/jarvis-os in missing-only mode.
Bootstrap a Jarvis OS at /readonly/jarvis-os where the path is not writable.
Use jarvis-bootstrap to write a client proposal deck for the Q3 sales pitch.
